flags.name: VITE_ENABLE_MOCKS
flags.rationale: Mocks are allowed only in controlled non-production environments.

flags.name: VITE_DEBUG
flags.rationale: Debug output should never be enabled in production by default.

flags.name: VITE_SENTRY_ENABLED
flags.rationale: Error monitoring is required in production and should remain on unless incident response requires temporary disablement.
